event_description: User successfully authenticated via GitHub OAuth.
User explicitly logged out and their session was destroyed.
User connected a GitHub repository to their account.
User disconnected their currently connected GitHub repository.
User manually triggered a repository sync.
A repository sync completed, recording whether it succeeded or failed.
A build-in-public content draft was generated for a platform.
User submitted a content draft for review.
User approved a content draft, moving it to approved status.
User rejected a content draft with an optional reason.
User scheduled or copied an approved content draft for publishing.
User marked a marketing asset as completed.
User manually overrode the status of a launch readiness checklist item.
